name: ZhangFei Legend
description: An H5 action game featuring Zhang Fei, a renowned general from the Three Kingdoms, where players take control of Zhang Fei and embark on a heroic adventure. The game employs a smooth combo system and unique character skill designs, showcasing Zhang Feis distinctive bold and powerful fighting style. With simple and intuitive controls, players can experience the thrill of Zhang Fei wielding his mighty spear and unleashing his thunderous roars to overwhelm his enemies.
